label: Default
description: Canonical doc-first profile with TASK.md as the primary artifact.

templates.dispatchSummary: The target session was instructed to edit TASK.md first, then sync through:
templates.dispatchEventMessage: Dispatched to {{session.agentId}}/{{session.name}}. Dispatch summary surfaced here: load ravi-system-tasks and edit {{task.taskDocPath}} first, then sync via ravi tasks report|done|block|fail {{task.id}}.

label: Brainstorm
description: Routes dispatch/resume through the brainstorm skill and its DRAFT.md artifact.

progress.notes: Sincronize progresso via runtime e mantenha o draft atualizado.

templates.dispatchSummary: The target session was instructed to load brainstorm, use the draft artifact as primary state, then sync through:
templates.dispatchEventMessage: Dispatched to {{session.agentId}}/{{session.name}}. Dispatch summary surfaced here: load brainstorm, persist in {{artifacts.primary.path}}, then sync via ravi tasks report|done|block|fail {{task.id}}.

label: Content
description: Bootstraps a raw content workspace in task_dir while keeping lifecycle, comments, and assignments in the task substrate.

progress.notes: Sincronize progresso via runtime; o workspace de content nao usa TASK.md.

templates.dispatchSummary: The target session received a content workspace rooted at task_dir. Work from the primary artifact and sync through:
templates.dispatchEventMessage: Dispatched to {{session.agentId}}/{{session.name}}. Content workspace rooted at {{task.taskDir}} with primary artifact {{artifacts.primary.path}}; keep lifecycle in the task substrate and sync via ravi tasks comment|report|done|block|fail {{task.id}}.

label: Video Rapha
description: Specialized content profile for the video pipeline rooted in the videomaker workspace. v0 requires a brief and uses the canonical `video` CLI surface under out/<video_id>.

inputs.label: Video ID
inputs.description: Canonical project id used under out/<video_id>.

inputs.label: Título
inputs.description: Working title surfaced to the videomaker workflow.

inputs.label: Brief
inputs.description: v0 requires a brief block; future versions may support fonte ou brief.

progress.notes: Use a CLI `video` como surface canônica; `wf eb` fica só como alias legado. Checkpoints F2/F4/F5 continuam in_progress ate haver impedimento real.

templates.dispatchSummary: The target session was instructed to operate inside the videomaker worktree, use the `video` CLI surface, and keep the project rooted at {{worktree.path}}/out/{{input.video_id}}.
templates.dispatchEventMessage: Dispatched to {{session.agentId}}/{{session.name}}. Video Rapha project rooted at {{worktree.path}}/out/{{input.video_id}} with runner state {{artifacts.primary.path}}; keep checkpoints F2/F4/F5 in-progress and sync via ravi tasks report|done|block|fail {{task.id}}.

label: Video Rapha Scene
description: Scene-local execution contract for the Rapha video pipeline. Own exactly one scene after the parent locks F0/F1/F2 + TTS and report back through the task runtime.

progress.notes: Cada scene task deve trabalhar fora do .wf-eb-state.json global e sincronizar progresso pelo runtime.

templates.dispatchSummary: The target session now owns exactly one scene under {{worktree.path}}/out/{{input.video_id}}. Build the scene-local artifacts and sync through:
templates.dispatchEventMessage: Dispatched to {{session.agentId}}/{{session.name}}. Scene {{input.scene_id}} for {{input.video_id}} now lives in the task runtime; keep work local to that scene and sync via ravi tasks report|done|block|fail {{task.id}}.

label: Task Doc Optional
description: Keeps a canonical task directory but does not materialize TASK.md automatically.

templates.dispatchSummary: The target session received the task with TASK.md optional. If it edits the document, sync through:
templates.dispatchEventMessage: Dispatched to {{session.agentId}}/{{session.name}}. Dispatch summary surfaced here: TASK.md is optional for this profile ({{task.taskDocPath}}); if the worker edits it, sync via ravi tasks report|done|block|fail {{task.id}}.

label: Runtime Only
description: Operates directly on the runtime substrate without TASK.md materialization.

templates.dispatchSummary: The target session received the task without a task-document protocol. Sync through:
templates.dispatchEventMessage: Dispatched to {{session.agentId}}/{{session.name}}. Dispatch summary surfaced here: operate directly in the runtime substrate and sync via ravi tasks report|done|block|fail {{task.id}}.
